belier.intro: The balsamic moon whispers in the final hours before the new moon in Taurus, dear Aries. This inner window invites your Martian fire to fold back like an ember under the ashes, just long enough to hear what wants to be reborn. You can use today to let go of a fight that no longer really concerns you.
belier.love: Venus in Gemini brings a light current to your affections and laughter returns like a breath. Partnered, you have a chance to rediscover the art of casual conversation, with no stakes and no strategy. Single, an encounter through words can spark your curiosity even before a face enters the scene.
belier.work: The waning lunar phase asks you to close rather than open today, and your conquering temperament can bend to it without betraying its nature. You have a chance to file away a lingering matter before the renewal of the new lunar cycle. Favor endings, the momentum will return in a few days.
belier.energy: Your inner fire prefers a gentle, rhythmic activity today over an explosive effort. Hydrate well and breathe deeply before launching into a packed day.
belier.intuition: The dark moon opens a door onto your still unformed desires. Note what surfaces upon waking or before sleep, those quiet images carry precious seeds.
belier.mantra: I let what wants to be reborn die its old form
belier.author: Sibylle

taureau.intro: The Sun crosses the final degrees of your sign before the new moon brewing in Taurus, dear Taurus. Today is a silent blank page, just before you set your intentions for a new personal solar year. Venus, your ruler, invites you to clarify what you truly want to see bloom.
taureau.love: Your earthy sensuality works quietly, like sap rising before the flower. Partnered, propose a moment of full presence with no phone or distraction, and the closeness blooms naturally. Single, your radiant calm attracts those who seek stability more than glitter.
taureau.work: This dark moon in your sign favors inner reviews before action, take a sheet of paper and write what truly matters to you for the next six months. You have a chance to cut what scatters you without any guilt. Keep your gem and let the rest go with gratitude.
taureau.energy: Your body craves simple pleasures today, a good meal, a warm bath, a luminous nap. Avoid too much caffeine, your nervous system needs space more than tension.
taureau.intuition: Your Venusian wisdom whispers that the best intentions germinate in fertile silence. Ask your body an intimate question and let the answer arrive through sensation.
taureau.mantra: I plant in silence what wants to flourish
taureau.author: Sibylle

gemeaux.intro: Mercury, your ruler, has returned to your sign and gives you back your nimble tongue, dear Gemini. The dark moon approaching in Taurus, however, invites you to a healthy retreat before your solar birthday. A day to dream, write and take notes, rather than publish or conclude.
gemeaux.love: Your mind whirls but your heart asks for a little tender restraint today. Partnered, listen twice as much as you speak and an old dialogue will find its thread again. Single, a silent attraction deserves your attention, even if it doesn't put itself on display.
gemeaux.work: This Taurean Sun passage invites you to clean your desk, inbox and lists before the next creative wave. You can use the calm to reformulate an idea that hadn't found its audience. Your words will land more accurately after this moment of sorting.
gemeaux.energy: Your nervous system enjoys slow, long breaths today, really more than usual. Put your phone down thirty minutes before sleep and you'll feel a real difference.
gemeaux.intuition: The dark moon refines your perception of behind-the-scenes signals and unsaid things. You sense what is brewing quietly, don't fear this lucidity, it protects you.
gemeaux.mantra: I listen before I speak, I dream before I act
gemeaux.author: Sibylle

cancer.intro: The Moon, your celestial ruler, glides into her dark phase in Taurus and activates your network of deeper friendships, dear Cancer. Today offers a chosen retreat rather than an imposed one, a temporary nest before the bigger collective movement of the coming days. You can choose precisely who deserves your emotional time.
cancer.love: Your sensitive heart looks today for presences that don't chafe. Partnered, a shared project with mutual friends strengthens your foundation. Single, an affinity group, a workshop, an intimate evening could connect you with someone who really speaks your language.
cancer.work: Venus in Gemini brings fluidity to your collaborations and supports a kind request for help. You have a chance to weave a precious professional bond out of a simple informal conversation. Avoid long-term commitments today, wait for the new moon.
cancer.energy: Your energy faithfully follows the lunar descent and that is precious to honor. A quiet evening at home beats a forced outing that would drain you.
cancer.intuition: The balsamic moon offers you dreams loaded with clear messages. Keep a notebook by your bed, your unconscious is working intensely right now.
cancer.mantra: I nourish my bonds by starting with myself
cancer.author: Sibylle

lion.intro: The Sun, your celestial ruler, radiates in its final Taurean stretch and activates your professional zone, dear Leo. The approaching dark moon invites you to finish before announcing, to mature before presenting. Your authority is measured today by your capacity for strategic discretion.
lion.love: Your magnetic presence works without a spotlight, and that is a luxury few can afford. Partnered, a concrete attention is worth a thousand perfumed promises. Single, someone observes you in a formal or professional setting and appreciates your restraint.
lion.work: This balsamic moon at the top of your natal chart lets you finalize a strategic project before its official announcement. You can polish the details that will make the difference when the new moon relaunches the big game. Stay faithful to your vision without disclosing it too soon.
lion.energy: Your solar fire enjoys today a steady warmth rather than a spectacular flame. Favor a sunlit walk, gentle yoga, or simply a few pages of an inspiring book.
lion.intuition: Your royal flair catches an important nuance in the tone of a message you received. Trust that first impression, it is truer than your second analysis.
lion.mantra: I ripen in silence what I'll announce in full light
lion.author: Sibylle

vierge.intro: Mercury, your ruler, now dances in Gemini and supports a more airy voice than usual, dear Virgo. The dark moon in Taurus invites you to widen your mental horizon before the fertile new moon. A day well suited to reading, studying, exploring a field that takes you out of your usual lanes.
vierge.love: Your heart looks today for intellectual depth as much as tenderness. Partnered, share a reading, a podcast, a film that opens a real conversation. Single, someone culturally different could spark your interest by the way they think.
vierge.work: This Taurean passage helps you finalize a training file, a work trip, or an international application. You have a chance to write with more fluidity thanks to Mercury in Gemini, use it for any delicate communications. The accuracy of your vocabulary will make the difference.
vierge.energy: Your body asks today for a change of air, even brief, an open window, a nearby park, a walking commute instead of the subway. The novelty of the environment recharges your vitality.
vierge.intuition: Your Mercurial wisdom whispers that you don't need to grasp everything intellectually to feel the truth. Loosen your analysis chart and let intuition speak again.
vierge.mantra: I widen my view to better choose my steps
vierge.author: Sibylle

balance.intro: Venus, your ruler, travels through Gemini and brings a lightness to your exchanges, dear Libra. The dark moon in Taurus activates your zone of shared resources and intimate transformations. A delicate day for noticing what is quietly transforming in you, without forcing a conclusion.
balance.love: Venus speaks to your heart today in a playful, almost adolescent tone. Partnered, a note of humor reopens a topic that had grown heavy. Single, a written exchange, a well-crafted message, can vibrate an unexpected string.
balance.work: This balsamic moon on your financial zone invites you to close a money discussion before the new moon. You can use the moment to clarify a shared budget, an insurance file, or a pending administrative matter. Peace arrives when the numbers find their proper place.
balance.energy: Your inner balance asks today for special attention to sleep and soft lighting. Avoid screens late in the evening, your nervous system will thank you.
balance.intuition: Your inner sense of justice perceives today a subtle truth about a give-and-take dynamic. Stay attentive without rushing to put words on it, the ground is preparing itself.
balance.mantra: I release what no longer balances me
balance.author: Sibylle

scorpion.intro: Pluto, your deep ruler, supports a quiet molting today, dear Scorpio. The dark moon in Taurus activates your partnership zone and asks you to release a subtle grip on someone else. You can use this day to observe your bonds with a gentler eye.
scorpion.love: Your Scorpio depth meets simplicity today, and that is a hidden gift. Partnered, accepting without digging into everything feels good to the other and to you. Single, don't jump to conclusions too fast, real intensity sometimes reveals itself slowly.
scorpion.work: This balsamic moon on your house of partnerships favors quiet renegotiations more than dramatic announcements. You have a chance to revisit an existing agreement gently, with no drama or display. Your strategic tact will be your best ally today.
scorpion.energy: Your physical intensity enjoys a precise outlet today, a targeted workout, a long walk, manual work. Avoid rumination, the body wants release.
scorpion.intuition: Your inner radar catches today what someone is not saying. Use this fineness to understand, not to unmask, the nuance is precious.
scorpion.mantra: I release the grip to reveal the bond
scorpion.author: Sibylle

sagittaire.intro: Jupiter, your generous ruler, encourages simplicity rather than expansion today, dear Sagittarius. The dark moon in Taurus activates your daily life zone and asks you to cherish a routine that holds you. A day of gentle pruning, no grand gestures and no grand declarations.
sagittaire.love: Your archer's heart enjoys today concrete attentions more than promises of adventure. Partnered, a small shared ritual strengthens the bond better than a dreamed-of trip. Single, someone simple and kind deserves your attention, even if your imagination is looking elsewhere.
sagittaire.work: This balsamic moon on your sixth house favors administrative cleanup, sorting emails, updating your calendar. You can finally settle a practical matter that has been dragging on too long. Mercury in Gemini supports clear communication with a work partner.
sagittaire.energy: Your body asks today for a steady pace, a stroll with no goal, a long stretch, a real lunch break. Politely decline what demands too much push.
sagittaire.intuition: Your Jovian flair sees big, but today the details carry the real cues. Look at what you've recently overlooked, a small treasure hides there.
sagittaire.mantra: I tend to the small to support the large
sagittaire.author: Sibylle

capricorne.intro: Saturn, your demanding ruler, allows you a rare softness today, dear Capricorn. The dark moon in Taurus activates your fifth house, the one of joy, play and living love. You can use this day to release a tension that was distancing you from your own pleasure.
capricorne.love: Venus in Gemini brings a lighter note to your often serious heart. Partnered, propose a playful moment, a game, an improvised walk, with no precise agenda. Single, your charm works better when you stop searching for someone perfectly aligned with your plan.
capricorne.work: This balsamic moon on your creative zone lets you finalize an artistic or personal project before the new moon. You have a chance to present an original idea inside a usually classical setting. Your authority will carry the novelty with credibility.
capricorne.energy: Your body needs play and pleasure movement today, not performance. Find an activity that makes you smile, dancing in the kitchen counts as much as a full sports session.
capricorne.intuition: Your Saturnian wisdom whispers that productivity also passes through enthusiasm. Grant yourself a joyful interlude and you'll reap unexpected dividends.
capricorne.mantra: I welcome joy as a true discipline
capricorne.author: Sibylle

verseau.intro: Uranus, your innovative ruler, proposes today an intimate revolution rather than a visible rupture, dear Aquarius. The dark moon in Taurus activates your roots and asks you to tend your home like a laboratory of ideas. A day to re-enchant your space without breaking everything.
verseau.love: Your close bonds gain from warm, embodied attention today. Partnered, a parenthesis at home strengthens a feeling of belonging. Single, a presence from your family circle or an old friendship could take an unexpected new place in your heart.
verseau.work: This balsamic moon on your fourth house favors a reorganization of your desk, your remote workspace, or your inner creative space. You can use the moment to finish a background file, off the collective radar. Discretion is your best asset today.
verseau.energy: Your airy body asks for grounding through your feet today, a walk outside, gardening, contact with matter. The ground recharges you better than another shot of coffee.
verseau.intuition: Your Uranian intuition catches a tender truth about your lineage or your family habits. Honor what surfaces without rushing to do anything, time will do its work.
verseau.author: Sibylle

poissons.intro: Neptune, your misty ruler, becomes surprisingly clear today, dear Pisces. The dark moon in Taurus activates your communication zone and offers you simple, powerful words. A day to say with softness what you have been turning over for too long.
poissons.love: Your watery heart expresses itself today with rare readability. Partnered, daring to name a vague feeling turns it into a bridge. Single, a well-chosen message can open a door you thought had closed long ago.
poissons.work: This balsamic moon on your third house favors your daily exchanges, emails, calls, internal notes. You have a chance to resend a proposal you hadn't dared to send, the reply could surprise you. Mercury in Gemini supports this dynamic in the days ahead.
poissons.energy: Your nervous system enjoys today calm, fluid atmospheres, soft music, dimmed lighting. Avoid constant notifications during your important tasks.
poissons.intuition: Your Neptunian perception condenses today into simple, strong images. Note your dreams and spontaneous thoughts, they carry a message for your week.
poissons.mantra: My words faithfully translate my heart
poissons.author: Sibylle
